pr.comment: includes both liquid and solid phases

ps.comment: surface pressure (not mean sea-level pressure), 2-D field to calculate the 3-D pressure field from hybrid coordinates

prc.comment: Convective precipitation at surface; includes both liquid and solid phases.

rlut.comment: at the top of the atmosphere (to be compared with satellite measurements)

mrfsos.cell_methods: area: mean where land time: point
mrfsos.long_name: Frozen Water Content in Upper Portion of Soil Column

mrsos.cell_methods: area: mean where land time: point
mrsos.long_name: Moisture in Upper Portion of Soil Column

evspsblpot.cell_methods: area: mean where land time: mean

zos.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: point
zos.comment: This is the dynamic sea level, so should have zero global area mean. It should not include inverse barometer depressions from sea ice.

tos.cell_methods: area: mean where sea time: point
tos.comment: Temperature of upper boundary of the liquid ocean, including temperatures below sea-ice and floating ice shelves.

sconcsoa.long_name: Surface Concentration of Secondary Organic Aerosol
